seo.title: Personal Trainer Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your training business or gym studio. Route unhappy clients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Personal Trainers & Gym Studios

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Personal Trainers & Gym Studios
hero.subheading: A great session doesn’t always turn into a Google review. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after the workout.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Trainer & Studio Faces

items.heading: Clients leave tired, not thinking about stars
items.body: They’re thinking about food and recovery, not your listing.

items.heading: Coaching friction can go public fast
items.body: When someone feels judged or mismatched, they post before they talk to you.

items.heading: Asking at the end of class feels awkward
items.body: You want energy on the floor, not a pitch.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Trainers & Studios

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the session
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when class ends or they check out.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Fits a packed schedule
items.body: Send the link right after the appointment.

items.heading: Catches issues before they hit Google
items.body: Private feedback gives you a chance to make it right first.

items.heading: Same link for members and drop-ins
items.body: One simple follow-up after every visit.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will clients leave reviews for gyms or training?
items.a: Yes, when you ask right after a session they enjoyed.
They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.

items.q: Do we need gym management software?
items.a: No. You can send requests manually by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small businesses.

items.q: Can I use this for a team of coaches?
items.a: Yes. Start with one link and add structure as you grow.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Training & Studio Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
